summary: PR 2455 matched `melee/vi/vi1101.c` by implementing `un_8031F714_OnEnter`, changing `vi1101.c` from NonMatching to Matching, adding local data/float definitions and symbol metadata for vi1101-owned sections, and making supporting include/prototype/inline-location cleanup across related files. Bot report records +588 matched code bytes for `main/melee/vi/vi1101::un_8031F714_OnEnter` and new 100% matches for vi1101 `.data`, `.sdata`, `.sdata2`, and `.sbss`.

key_files.role: Primary decomp target; implements `un_8031F714_OnEnter`, adds `Vi1101Data`, vi1101 asset strings/spawn data, local float constants, archive/camera/model setup, and updates `un_8031F294` signatures and accesses.
Header cleanup for recovered signatures: removes placeholder include and `UNK_T`, keeps `un_804D6FD8` extern, changes `un_8031F294` args to `s32`, and `un_8031F714_OnEnter` to `void*`.
Symbol metadata update for vi1101-related data: adjusts object sizes, adds local `...data.0` label, and changes several `.sdata2` float symbols from global address names to local labels.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists vi1101 `.data`, `.sdata`, `.sdata2`, `.sbss` as new 100% matches

key_files.role: Removes `<MSL/math_ppc.h>` include and the `HSD_MtxColMagFloat` static inline from the header.
Adds `<MSL/math_ppc.h>` include and a file-local inline `HSD_MtxColMagFloat` implementation.
Adds `<MSL/math_ppc.h>` include and a file-local inline `HSD_MtxColMagFloat` implementation.
Mostly formatting/layout cleanup around table initializers, long calls, blend expressions, casts, and texture buffer allocation.
Formatting/layout cleanup of long casts, SIS text calls, and asset-load argument lists; preserves inline string literals.
Include ordering and line-wrap cleanup around `HSD_GObj_SetupProc`.

what_changed: `un_8031F714_OnEnter` in `src/melee/vi/vi1101.c` was implemented from a placeholder into scene-entry setup code that initializes audio/effects, loads archives, creates light/camera/model GObjs, animates scene models, calls `un_8031F294(input[0], input[1])`, and restores audio state.
`vi1101.c` now defines a `Vi1101Data` struct grouping three spawn `Vec3`s and the strings `Vi1101.dat`, `visual1101Scene`, and `visual1101Cam2Scene` in one static object at `un_80400200`.
`vi1101.c` adds local float constants for `1.0f`, `0.0f`, and `432.0f`, plus `GXColor un_804D5B08 = { 0, 0, 0, 0xff }` and `u8 un_804D6FD8[8]`.
`un_8031F294` was retouched to use `s32` args, `VecMtxPtr`, `un_80400200.spawns`, local float constants, `GET_JOBJ`, and a shifted `u64` expression for the audio flag.
`vi1101.h` was updated to remove placeholder/unknown types and expose recovered prototypes.
`symbols.txt` adjusted sizes/scopes for vi1101 data and local float labels, corresponding to bot-reported vi1101 data-section matches.
`HSD_MtxColMagFloat` was moved out of `baselib/mtx.h` and added as a file-local inline in `displayfunc.c` and `robj.c`, while several source files gained direct `<MSL/math_ppc.h>` includes.
`ifmagnify.c`, `ifmagnify.h`, `mndatadel.c`, and `mninfo.c` received mostly formatting/include-order cleanup with no clear semantic changes in the excerpt.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired the code match with `configure.py` status and bot-visible section results, making the vi1101 closure easy to identify.

The vi1101 asset strings and spawn vectors were grouped into a temporary typed aggregate instead of leaving all data as disconnected address-style symbols, which made later code refer to `un_80400200.spawns`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/vi/vi1101.c `typedef struct Vi1101Data` and `static Vi1101Data un_80400200`

smart_moves.text: Header prototypes were updated after recovering the body, replacing `UNK_T` with `void*` for `un_8031F714_OnEnter` and aligning `un_8031F294` with the recovered `s32` arguments.
Ordinary asset/resource strings in `mndatadel.c` remained inline during formatting cleanup, avoiding string-literal-to-symbol churn.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a TU-local data blob contains both vectors and asset names, a small temporary struct can express the layout and allow source uses like `.spawns` while preserving data order.
After recovering a body signature, update the owning header instead of keeping placeholder includes or `UNK_T` in public prototypes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: vi1101.h removes `<placeholder.h>` and changes `un_8031F714_OnEnter(UNK_T)` to `un_8031F714_OnEnter(void*)`

decomp_lessons.lesson: For code-matching PRs, symbol metadata edits for `.data`, `.sdata`, `.sdata2`, and `.sbss` should be tied to the specific object being closed and supported by report output rather than treated as unrelated cleanup.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists vi1101 data sections reaching 100.00%

naming_conventions.convention: Unproven globals remained address-style (`un_80400200`, `un_804D6FC0`, `un_804D6FC4`, `un_804D6FC8`, `un_804D6FCC`, `un_804D6FD0`, `un_804D6FD8`) while only local struct fields received modest role names such as `spawns` and asset-string field names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/vi/vi1101.c static globals and `Vi1101Data` fields

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered prototypes used concrete primitive/pointer types (`s32`, `void*`) rather than placeholder names once the implementation supplied evidence.
Some semantics were deliberately not overclaimed: fields in the two-GObj static were renamed from `p1`/`p2` to `unk0`/`unk4`, indicating uncertainty rather than invented meaning.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use local `static f32 const` symbols for repeated float literals where symbol metadata/report evidence indicates TU-local `.sdata2` ownership.
Use `GET_JOBJ` for GObj-to-JObj access in vi1101 where the recovered source changed direct `hsd_obj` casts to the project helper.
Move a header inline into the narrow C files that need its `sqrtf` form, paired with direct `<MSL/math_ppc.h>` includes, when header-level inclusion/inlining appears to interfere with matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/sysdolphin/baselib/displayfunc.c and robj.c add local inline `HSD_MtxColMagFloat`

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Express large integer audio flags with a shifted `u64` term instead of a raw full-width literal when that source shape is used in the matching function.

follow_up_queries: Search later PRs for `Vi1101Data` or `un_80400200` to see whether field names were refined after this match.
Search later PRs for `HSD_MtxColMagFloat` to determine whether moving this inline out of `mtx.h` became a recurring baselib tactic or was specific to this PR.
Search for later edits to `un_8031F714_OnEnter` to validate whether temporary locals such as `new_var`, `new_var2`, and `new_var3` were cleaned up.
Search symbol history for `@166` through `@195` and `un_804DE0D8` through `un_804DE0F0` to confirm whether these `.sdata2` labels remained local to vi1101.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, author, changed files, line counts
diff_excerpt and raw_diff: concrete code and symbol changes
text_corpus: bot report with match percentages and byte deltas
notes: PR body is empty and there are no review comments or reviews in the slice, so author intent and reviewer rationale are not available.
The bot report gives strong evidence for match progress, especially `un_8031F714_OnEnter` +588 bytes and vi1101 data-section matches.
No local build logs, objdiff details, or reviewer acceptance comments are included beyond the PR being merged and the bot report.
Several non-vi1101 changes appear to be supporting include/formatting cleanup, but the slice does not explain whether each was required for the match.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use temporary structs to express contiguous TU-local data blobs when evidence supports layout
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2455 grouped vi1101 spawn vectors and asset strings into `Vi1101Data` and used `un_80400200.spawns` in code; symbol metadata and bot output show vi1101 data sections reaching 100%. This is a candidate lesson for data-layout recovery, not a blanket rule to name all exposed data.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered bodies should drive header cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2455 removed placeholder/unknown prototype forms in `vi1101.h` after implementing `un_8031F714_OnEnter`, replacing `UNK_T` with `void*` and using concrete `s32` args for `un_8031F294`.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2455 matched `src/melee/vi/vi1101.c`
source_update_candidates.text: `configure.py` changed `melee/vi/vi1101.c` from NonMatching to Matching. Bot report for this PR lists `main/melee/vi/vi1101::un_8031F714_OnEnter` as +588 bytes, 0.00% to 100.00%, and vi1101 `.data`, `.sdata`, `.sdata2`, and `.sbss` as new 100% matches.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-level history for later vi1101 work and match-status lookup.

source_update_candidates.title: `HSD_MtxColMagFloat` moved out of `baselib/mtx.h` in PR 2455
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2455 removed `HSD_MtxColMagFloat` from `src/sysdolphin/baselib/mtx.h` and added identical file-local inline definitions in `displayfunc.c` and `robj.c`, along with direct `<MSL/math_ppc.h>` includes in several C files.
source_update_candidates.reason: May help future matching work involving `sqrtf`, `math_ppc.h`, and baselib matrix helpers; should be curated as path history, not a global standard unless corroborated elsewhere.

source_update_candidates.title: vi1101 asset strings and spawn data layout
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2455's `Vi1101Data` initializer associates three spawn vectors with strings `Vi1101.dat`, `visual1101Scene`, and `visual1101Cam2Scene` in the vi1101 data object at `un_80400200`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential data-sheet enrichment for vi1101 scene resource names and spawn positions, pending curator validation.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all `GET_JOBJ` rewrites are preferred globally; this PR only shows local use in vi1101.
Do not promote the `HSD_MtxColMagFloat` header-to-C-file move as a global standard from this slice alone; no review rationale is present.
Do not claim reviewer intent or manual objdiff commands; the slice has no reviews and only a bot report.
Do not infer semantic names for vi1101 globals beyond what the diff actually introduced.
